ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity category */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Total population size for the demographic group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group segment */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender segment */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area (e.g., city, county, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the demographic group associated with the tests */,
  "covid_test_count" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 tests conducted */,
  "covid_test_pct" REAL /* Percentage of tests conducted relative to the demographic population size */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the tests were conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, antigen) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tests were conducted (e.g., hospital, clinic, home) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_tests_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the demographic group associated with the cases */,
  "covid_count" INTEGER /* Total number of positive COVID-19 cases */,
  "covid_count_pct" REAL /* Percentage of cases relative to the demographic population size */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date when the cases were confirmed */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the cases (e.g., mild, severe, critical) */,
  "hospitalization_status" TEXT /* Hospitalization status (e.g., hospitalized, not hospitalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the demographic group associated with the deaths */,
  "covid_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 related deaths */,
  "covid_deaths_pct" REAL /* Percentage of deaths relative to the demographic population size */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date when the deaths occurred */,
  "underlying_conditions" TEXT /* Underlying health conditions that may have contributed to the deaths */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Primary cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_deaths_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the demographic group */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "total_positive_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of positive cases reported */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported */,
  "test_date_range" TEXT /* Date range for the statistics */,
  "average_test_result_time" REAL /* Average time taken to get test results */,
  "test_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_statistics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "geographical_focus" TEXT /* Geographical area the report focuses on */,
  "case_study" TEXT /* Case studies or detailed analyses in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_generation" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report generation event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "generation_status" TEXT /* Status of the report generation (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "generation_duration" REAL /* Time taken to generate the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_generation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_generation_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES health_reports ("report_id")
)
